attacks.name: command_injection
attacks.label: Command Injection
attacks.description: Forces pump ON/OFF every 5s via Write Coil (FC 0x05)

attacks.name: valve_manipulation
attacks.label: Valve Manipulation
attacks.description: Random valve positions (0-180) every 3s via Write Register (FC 0x06)

attacks.name: sensor_spoofing
attacks.label: Sensor Spoofing
attacks.description: Writes fake tank levels (0-100) every 2s via Write Register (FC 0x06)

attacks.name: modbus_flood
attacks.label: Modbus Flood (DoS)
attacks.description: 100x Read Holding Registers (FC 0x03) in tight loop

attacks.name: stuxnet_rootkit
attacks.label: Stuxnet-Style Rootkit (MitM)
attacks.description: MitM proxy: intermittent attack cycles (20s interval, 8s active) — actuator manipulation + sensor falsification
